evaluators.name: Bookmark Three Qualifying Weekend Tree-Planting Events Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user bookmarked at least three in-person tree-planting events on Saturdays/Sundays in June 2025 within ~25 miles of ZIP 94110, and used 94110 in their event search.

evaluators.name: Low-Cost High-Impact Action Plan Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the active action plan is saved with the correct name, has exactly five actions, and all actions cost no more than $50/month with impact score at least 3.

evaluators.name: Carbon Footprint Goal for 3-Person Household Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the latest carbon assessment is for a 3-person household and has an active reduction goal of at least 20%, preferably named '20% Reduction for 3-Person Home'.

evaluators.name: Monthly Wildlife Pledge Under $30 Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user created an active monthly $25 pledge to a wildlife project with transparency rating >=4 and suggested monthly donation <=$30, and optionally used the expected donor details.

evaluators.name: Evening Ocean Conservation Webinar Registration Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user registered (with the expected details) for an evening ocean conservation webinar/online event within 60 days and added it to the dashboard.

evaluators.name: Plastic Pollution Reading List Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user created a reading list that contains exactly four articles, all beginner-level on plastic pollution, each <=10 minutes reading time and published within the last two years, and optionally named 'Plastic Pollution Starters'.

evaluators.name: Join Local Wildlife Volunteer Group Weekly Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user searched for wildlife groups near ZIP 30309 with correct filters and joined a qualifying nearby wildlife-focused group with weekly participation.

evaluators.name: Activate Easy Daily Energy-Saving Challenges Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user completed the lifestyle quiz and has at least three active challenges from quiz recommendations that are Easy, Energy Saving, and set to daily frequency.
